full_text:
King Duosi 思朵大王
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
King Duosi (思朵大王). Officer of Meng Huo. Said to be the wisest man in all of Nanman. King Duosi is a fictional character. King Duosi was affiliated with Nanman.
